name: wildfire_evacuation_prison_hospital
premise: County emergency chief Marisol Vega is coordinating evacuations as a fast-moving wildfire jumps containment lines and begins surrounding the only highway out of Red Canyon. She has enough buses and medical transport to evacuate either the locked psychiatric hospital with eighty sedated patients or the minimum-security prison camp with seventy inmates and the firefighting crews supervising them before smoke makes both routes impassable. State policy says evacuation priority should be based on medical vulnerability, but several prison inmates are currently deployed on active fire lines and could help defend neighboring homes if they remain. Families of hospital patients are begging officials not to leave heavily medicated relatives behind, while the sheriff warns that abandoning the prison camp could trigger panic and a deadly mass escape. Marisol must issue the transport order within fifteen minutes.

agents.name: Marisol Vega
agents.identity: I am the county emergency chief responsible for evacuation planning during climate-driven fire seasons. I have trained my staff to rely on triage principles rather than public pressure when every option carries harm.
agents.goal: I want to use our limited transport in the fairest way possible while protecting those least able to survive on their own. I need a rule I can defend to both grieving families and the broader community.

agents.name: Sheriff Tom Brant
agents.identity: I am the elected sheriff overseeing the prison camp and the surrounding rural towns. I know the inmates by name and I also know how quickly fear can turn one failed evacuation into a regional disaster.
agents.goal: I want to evacuate the prison camp first so we do not create a violent emergency on top of the wildfire. I believe public order and the ability to keep fighting the fire matter for everyone in the county.

choices: I will send the first evacuation convoy to the psychiatric hospital because the sedated patients are the least able to protect themselves and are owed priority care.
I will send the first evacuation convoy to the prison camp because preventing a security collapse and preserving firefighting capacity best protects the wider community.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Marisol Vega must decide which facility receives the first and possibly only full evacuation convoy. What does Marisol Vega do?
